metadata.note: This is the pipeline's real predict_match() output, captured BEFORE the MatchContext refactor, using frozen point-in-time snapshot data (not live production files) so a future diff isolates pipeline behavior changes rather than data drift. The 'generated' timestamp field is stripped from every fixture's output for the same reason -- see module docstring in snapshot_golden_predictions.py.
